messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
Looking at my current state, I have items in my inventory but I haven't equipped my armor yet. I'll put on my leather tunic immediately.
Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 3.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 2.3 blocks away
Hostiles incoming! I'll engage the nearest one and let my teammate know which target I'm taking.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Attacking zombie 16"
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Attacking zombie 15
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 9.4 (10.6 lost)

Health is critical at 9.4. The rules say to trigger a retreat the instant health drops below 10, so I need to break off and heal immediately. I'll inform my teammate and relocate to open ground while eating.

arguments.message: Retreating east to open ground, health 9.4

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Retreating east to open ground, health 9.4"
Me <RETREATED>: Moved toward (8, -8). Ate 1 bread. Final hunger: 17.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Attacking zombie 16

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16

I used or lost:
- 1 Bread
My health is still critical at 9.4, so I need to keep relocating and eating until I recover above 12. I’ll retreat further into open ground while continuing to eat bread.
Me <RETREATED>: Moved toward (20, -8). Ate 1 bread. Final hunger: 20.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 17 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 18 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 20 is 11.2 blocks away

I used or lost:
- 1 Bread

Multiple new hostiles: two zombies at 4 blocks — one north, one south — boxing me along the same x-axis. With two threats inside 8 blocks, Rule 6 says move perpendicular to the nearest threat instead of standing still to fight. I’ll equip my sword for readiness and sidestep east to break the pincer, then reassess once I'm clear.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.
Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (25, 0, -8) with radius 1.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Attacking zombie 20

My retreat to open ground is already underway, so I don’t need to send an acknowledgement—I’ll stay the course and let the move finish. If Zombie 17 or 18 catches up, I’ll engage the nearest unengaged threat since Bot2 is busy with Zombie 20.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Retreating east from cluster, health around 15

Two zombies are still trailing me from the earlier pincer near x25 z-8. Since Bot2 is also falling back eastward, I need to warn him so we don’t accidentally funnel both clusters together. I’ll keep relocating while sending a brief status ping.

arguments.message: Two zombies trailing me near x25 z-8. Health 20. Don't run into this line.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Two zombies trailing me near x25 z-8. Health 20. Don't run into this line."

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 20

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 13.0 (7.0 lost)

Took a heavy hit while repositioning, so I need to break contact immediately. I’ll move diagonally southeast to throw off the pursuing pair and keep my stone sword ready since they’re already on top of me. No time to message—my movement is the status signal.
Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (35, 0, 2) with radius 1.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Retreating northeast, health 3.9

Seeing Bot2 at critical health changes the tactical picture; if we both funnel into the same area we’ll create a death-ball. I need to warn him away from my line while letting my current retreat finish.

arguments.message: Health 13, still pursued by two zombies. Keep retreating NE—don't loop toward me or we'll stack mobs.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Health 13, still pursued by two zombies. Keep retreating NE—don't loop toward me or we'll stack mobs."
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot1 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 13.0 to 1.4 (11.6 lost)
I’m at critical health—1.4 HP—and still in contact with the north-south pincer. I must break off immediately, eat while I run, and warn Bot2 so he doesn’t converge on the same cluster.

arguments.message: CRIT—health 1.4, breaking southeast to escape the pincer. Stay clear of my line.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "CRIT—health 1.4, breaking southeast to escape the pincer. Stay clear of my line."
Me <RETREATED>: Moved toward (50, -10). Ate 1 bread. Final hunger: 17.
